creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text: It is hard to recall why have I done that 9 years ago, but it seems `ctladm port -l` is equivalent to `ctladm portlist`.  And `-x` and `-q` arguments are useless  without `-l`.  I guess I could keep it in the code to not break existing scripts, while remove from documentation to make it more clear.  May be I was going to clean up code later, but it just never happened.  I don't think I'd like restoring the documentation, preferring probably further cleanup.  Whether to remove the actual code, I don't have preference.
